ab: iké danɨ kakurongo?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ikédanɨ tsiersierka adringi sierkɨ.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: iké danɨ kakurongo?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ikai, mobulɨtɨla, ngiyubunga ka lusa siviri.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: iké danɨ mumu?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: iké danɨ garɨ, mua mbɨlɨngɨ silpe nia!
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: iké danɨ ico?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Ubakɨ yo, médavlinga ku icɨngɨlali swa, margi musu?
ch: B:是Ubakɨ阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Ubakɨ. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: margi kɨkɨ! mukanikɨ silpe swa modradrɨke.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: ikadra ku mama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: iké tkankana tlacɨnge, kwa koko nia.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: uwani ki Mumuni?
en: Where did Mumuni go?

ab: amua tarukukana puaranga turoka.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: mumo, mukaninga namɨ.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: ikai danɨ ki mumumua, iké toma, drodrovadri mua siviridranga iké danɨ.!
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: mukani musu nga mau Say!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: médavli nga ipcacɨngɨla ta, maragre nga musu.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: cɨnglɨ madɨ taknianɨsu ka mbebere ku kdrɨdrɨmɨ madɨ.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: sbénɨme mua kné pungudrɨle, apua madɨ podringi pingsiang.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: médavlinga ikwaniasu, nanga kiania samia mukné nguresɨ kuenɨ.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: adra ikopungu, nungulu mili na ocia si mekɨtɨnga, nanga si takédanɨ modradrɨkɨ.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: takdrɨngésu tormana kwa, nusiviri manga kɨkɨ.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: kirulathɨ la kné turoka, mra umcɨ pisiviri ngitikii kuenɨ.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
